zh.lifeSummary: Lady Audrey de Audley於1365年出生在英國。她和Sir John Titley至少有1個女兒。她去世於1450年在她的家鄉享年85歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lady Audrey de Audley于1365年出生在英国。她和Sir John Titley至少有1个女儿。她去世于1450年在她的家乡享年85岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Audley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Audley in Staffordshire, named from the Old English female personal name Aldgȳth + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: ‘tendril’ or ‘creeper’, often used in metaphors describing the slender curvature of eyebrows, arms, hair, swords, lightning, and women's bodies.

nameMeanings.name: Audrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Much altered form of the Old English girl's name Æðelþryð, derived from æðel ‘noble’ + þryð ‘strength’. This was the name of a 6th-century saint (normally known by the Latinized form of her name, Etheldreda), who was a particular favourite in the Middle Ages. According to tradition she died from a tumour of the neck, which she bore stoically as a divine punishment for her youthful delight in fine necklaces. The name went into a decline at the end of the Middle Ages, when it came to be considered vulgar, being associated with tawdry, that is, lace and other goods sold at fairs held in her name (the word deriving from a misdivision of Saint Audrey). Shakespeare bestowed it on Touchstone's comic sweetheart in As You Like It. In the 20th century, such associations largely forgotten, the name was revived, partly due in the 1950s and 60s to the popularity of the actress Audrey Hepburn ( 1929–93 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Lady Audrey de Audley was born in 1365, in England. She had at least 1 daughter with Sir John Titley. She died in 1450, in her hometown, at the age of 85.

fr.lifeSummary: Lady Audrey de Audley est née en 1365, à Angleterre. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Sir John Titley. Elle est décédée en 1450, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 85 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Lady Audrey de Audley wurde 1365 in England geboren. Sie hatte mit Sir John Titley mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1450 im Alter von 85 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Lady Audrey de Audley è nata il nel 1365 nel England. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Sir John Titley. Morì nel 1450, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 85 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Audrey de Audleyは1365年にイギリスで生まれた。彼女はSir John Titleyとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1450年に故郷で85歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Audrey de Audley(은)는 1365년 영국에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Sir John Titley(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1450년 그녀의 고향에서 85세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Lady Audrey de Audley nasceu em 1365, em Inglaterra. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Sir John Titley. Ela faleceu em 1450, em sua cidade natal, com 85 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Lady Audrey de Audley родилась в 1365 г. в местности Англия. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Sir John Titley. Она умерла в 1450 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 85 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Lady Audrey de Audley nació en 1365, en Inglaterra. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Sir John Titley. Murió en 1450, en su pueblo, a la edad de 85 años.
